name: openEuler sig-industrial-control SIG
description: The Industrial control  SIG group is mainly dedicated to developing OpenEuler as a real-time operating system for industrial control or embedded applications.

name: openEuler sig-industrial-control SIG Repository List
description: openEuler sig-industrial-control SIG maintains 26 repositories in the Embedded and IoT domain

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-industrial-control SIG (Special Interest Group) is responsible for The Industrial control  SIG group is mainly dedicated to developing OpenEuler as a real-time operating system for industrial control or embedded applications.. The SIG has 16 core members and maintains 26 repositories in the Embedded and IoT domain.

mainEntity.name: How to participate in openEuler sig-industrial-control SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: To participate in openEuler sig-industrial-control SIG: 1) Submit Pull Requests to relevant repositories; 2) Subscribe to the mailing list at industrial-control@openeuler.org; 3) Attend SIG regular meetings, see the openEuler website calendar for details.

mainEntity.name: What repositories does openEuler sig-industrial-control SIG include?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-industrial-control SIG maintains 26 repositories. Full list at https://www.openeuler.org/en/sig/sig-industrial-control.

mainEntity.name: Who are the Maintainers of openEuler sig-industrial-control SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-industrial-control SIG has 6 Maintainers, including: Guo Hao, Wu Chunguang, Ma Yukun. Maintainers are responsible for final code review and merging.
